steps.title: Identify the target meaning from the elaboration
steps.content: The em-dash followed by they assumed reveals the historians formed a belief. The blank needs a verb meaning to believe or think.

steps.title: Match the word to the target
steps.content: Surmised directly expresses assuming something based on available evidence, matching how the historians believed large households achieved food-purchase economies of scale. The other three choices either contradict the immediate context, don't express belief formation, or wrongly imply deliberate deception. That matches choice A — A is correct.
